title: Market engine with order books, matching, and price history
description: Implement src/market/order_book.rs: Order struct (agent_id, commodity, side Buy/Sell, price, quantity, tick_placed, ttl). OrderBook struct per city per commodity. Methods: (1) place_order — add to book. (2) match_orders — price-time priority: best price first, then earliest. Execute at midpoint price. Partial fills keep remainder. Tax deducted from buyer (tax_rate × value). No self-matching. (3) expire_orders — remove orders past TTL (default 200 ticks). (4) generate_npc_demand — city generates passive buy orders: qty = population × 0.01 × necessity_weight (PROVISIONS 3.0, GRAIN 2.0, TOOLS 1.5, MEDICINE 1.5, BRICKS 1.0, others 0.5). NPC price = last_known × (1.0 + 0.05 × scarcity). NPC gold from city treasury; austerity when treasury < 50g. (5) price_history — per-commodity time series (last 2000 ticks), recording execution prices. Provide market_hall upgrade support: doubles order book capacity. Implement dynamic tax adjustment logic (called from city). Create src/market/mod.rs.
result_summary:
Both files are already fully implemented and all 29 tests pass. Here's a summary of what's in place:

**`src/market/mod.rs`** — module declarations for `order_book` and `crafting`.

**`src/market/order_book.rs`** — complete implementation:

| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| `Order` struct (agent_id, commodity, side, price, quantity, tick_placed, ttl) | Defined in `types.rs:490-499` |
| `OrderBook` per city with buy/sell books + price history | `order_book.rs:39-45` |
| `place_order` — capacity-checked insertion | `order_book.rs:87-98` |
| `match_orders` — price-time priority, midpoint execution, partial fills, no self-match, tax deduction | `order_book.rs:110-149` + `match_orders_inner` at line 294 |
| `expire_orders` — TTL-based removal (default 200 ticks) | `order_book.rs:154-161` |
| `generate_npc_demand` — population × 0.01 × necessity_weight, scarcity pricing, treasury-funded, austerity mode (<50g) | `order_book.rs:173-228` |
| `price_history` — per-commodity VecDeque capped at 2000 entries, VWAP averaging | `order_book.rs:233-264` |
| Market hall upgrade — doubles capacity (100 → 200) | `order_book.rs:59-65` |
| `compute_dynamic_tax` — volume/treasury/population-based adjustment, clamped [0.0, 0.15] | `order_book.rs:378-408` |
| Necessity weights: PROVISIONS 3.0, GRAIN 2.0, TOOLS 1.5, MEDICINE 1.5, BRICKS 1.0, others 0.5 | `types.rs:100-109` |

Everything compiles and all tests pass.
